Profiles.Name: FBP Ops Terminal
Profiles.Command: /bin/zsh -lc 'cd "$HOME/Documents/FBP_Backend" && VENV_PATH="$HOME/Documents/.venvs/fbp"; if [ -d "$VENV_PATH" ]; then source "$VENV_PATH/bin/activate"; fi && if [ -f "$HOME/Documents/_PROJECTS_OFICIAL/FoKS_Intelligence/ops/logs/fbp_backend.out" ]; then tail -n 100 -F "$HOME/Documents/_PROJECTS_OFICIAL/FoKS_Intelligence/ops/logs/fbp_backend.out" & fi && exec /bin/zsh'
